backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the backend for PRODAL TEX, including fabric product management, customer inquiry submission/retrieval, user profile management, and access-control-gated admin operations using MixinAuthorization and MixinStorage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a fix for the AdminDashboardPage inquiry data-fetching issue, referencing the affected files (useQueries.ts, AdminDashboardPage.tsx) and the test ID REQ-35.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and recent changes across pages, components, hooks, and config files.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell with the page title set to 'PRODAL TEX - Premium Fabric Supplier' and a root div that mounts the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with routes for Home, Products, Product Detail, Contact, and Admin Dashboard, all wrapped in the Layout component.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying the PRODAL TEX brand, quick navigation links, and real business contact details (email, phone, Surat address) with clickable mailto/tel links.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky site header with logo, desktop and mobile navigation links (Home, Products, Contact, Admin), and a 'Get a Quote' CTA button; no auth-conditional logic.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout wrapper that renders the Header and Footer around a TanStack Router Outlet for all child pages.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Renders a fabric product card with image, badge, specs (GSM, width), color, price, and a link to the product detail page.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching all products, a single product, submitting customer inquiries, and fetching all inquiries from the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines CSS custom properties for the brand color palette in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Password-protected admin page that displays a table of customer inquiries fetched from the backend, with skeleton loading states and timestamp formatting.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact and inquiry form page that validates user input, pre-selects a product from URL params, and submits inquiries to the backend via the useSubmitInquiry mutation.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page for Prodal Tex featuring a hero banner, selling points section, and a grid of up to 3 featured products fetched via the useGetAllProducts hook.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailPage.tsx: Product detail page that fetches a single product by ID from the route params and displays its image, specs (weight, width, price, etc.), and a contact/quote call-to-action.
frontend/src/pages/ProductsPage.tsx: Products listing page that fetches all products and provides a color filter dropdown, rendering the filtered results in a responsive grid with loading and error states.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing helper functions to read, persist, and clear URL query parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, using sessionStorage for persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom brand color tokens (charcoal, offwhite, teal), custom font families (Playfair Display, Inter), extended shadows, and enabling the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state (version 27) for the 'Prodal Tex' e-commerce site, documenting architectural notes, existing features, known issues, and the current status of product categories (Clothing and Fabrics, both empty).
